_comment: API-Football team id -> our FIFA 3-letter code. Used ONLY by write-live-scores.ts to translate live in-play fixtures into the UI's code-keyed live-scores.json. Generated read-only from the DB (national_team_usage_records.api_team_id <-> teams.fifa_code) for project ahcfrgxczbgdvrqmbisw on 2026-06-04. Regenerate if a team's API mapping changes.
